SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-19-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-19-2017 BY NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CABINET COMPANY, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY VICTORIA SALA, CFO. DEFENDANT FRANCE SZATEO IS PRESENT. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: SAMUEL LAW; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED. AS TO DEFENDANT SZETO, FRANCE

EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-01-2017 ORDERED DESTROYED
